item.title: Crypto and Security conference schedule
item.description: Here is a detailed link to IACR events. Venues Submission Early Rejection Rebuttal Final Notification Camera Ready S&P (Third issue) 2 Dec 2022 23 Jan 2023 21 Feb-7 Mar 2023 10 Mar 2023 7 Apr 2023 AsiaCCS2023 (Second issue) 15 Dec 2022 30 Jan 2023 22 Mar 2023 4 Apr 2023 Esorics (First issue) 22 Jan 2023 26 Mar 2023 2 Apr 2023 20 Aug 2023 CSF2023 3 Feb 2023 7 Apr 2023 15 June 2023 USENIX2023 (Winter deadline) 7 Feb 2023 17 Mar 2023 April 24–26 2023 8 May 2023 13 Jun 2023 CRYPTO2023 16 Feb 2023 5 May 2023 PETS2023 Feb 28 2023 Apr 10–14 2023 1 May 2023 15 June 2023 —–Avaliable——–

item.title: An efficient approach regarding two party private set union/intersection cardinality
item.description: The two-party private set union/intersection cardinality problems (PSI/PSU-CA) are among the privacy-preserving computing problems, which are also fundamental and essential. They require that after protocol execution, at least one of the two parties gets their intersection/union cardinality securely with neither one leaked any other extra information to the other.
